scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK Via:[$7] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Record-Route:[$5] Allow: INVITE,REFER,NOTIFY,UPDATE,SUBSCRIBE,INFO Allow-Events: conference Contact: <sip:[$6]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> [routes] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 987650 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [media_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 8000 RTP/SAVP 0 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:PPo+O5/tQA7d3el7zXcNzor0JKUBsY40/ox1rB3e a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [field1] <sip:[field1]@[field3]>;[$2] To: [field0] <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;[$1] Call-ID:[$3] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> [routes] Supported: 100rel Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
o=user1 987650 2 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [media_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 8000 RTP/AVP 0 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=sendonly a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:PPo+O5/tQA7d3el7zXcNzor0JKUBsY40/ox1rB3e UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 m=video 8002 RTP/AVP 0 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=sendonly a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:6IkbfKPKipYkIciZeI4aNEdwxe4aSUOPOHT/bvbv UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [field1] <sip:[field1]@[field3]>;[$2] To: [field0] <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;[$1] Call-ID:[$3] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Record-Route:[$5] Allow: INVITE,REFER,NOTIFY,UPDATE,SUBSCRIBE,INFO Allow-Events: conference Contact: <sip:[$6]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> [routes] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 987650 3 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [media_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 8000 RTP/SAVP 0 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:PPo+O5/tQA7d3el7zXcNzor0JKUBsY40/ox1rB3e a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 m=video 8002 RTP/SAVP 0 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:6IkbfKPKipYkIciZeI4aNEdwxe4aSUOPOHT/bvbv a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [field1] <sip:[field1]@[field3]>;[$2] To: [field0] <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;[$1] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Call-ID:[$3] CSeq: 2 INVITE Supported: 100rel Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
o=user1 987650 3 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [media_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 a=group:ANAT 93 59 m=audio 8000 RTP/AVP 0 120 c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=mid:93 a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:vJN9Am+HTpaTro2mQwJelyHw0YkCVzYZkWmYqfiz UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:2 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:C9Xs6FPCPzw4WVGOZNx2BlxFz7DrXxlA/3if0Y5Q UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:2 t=1 a=2 m=audio 8002 RTP/AVP 0 120 c=IN IP6 2001:db8::d170 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=mid:59 a=tcap:2 RTP/SAVP a=acap:3 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:vJN9Am+HTpaTro2mQwJelyHw0YkCVzYZkWmYqfiz UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=acap:4 crypto:2 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:TWcLJDMSok0/UnmZ7mqzPVC0qHDBMMJ7gD30fdBa UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=2 a=3 a=pcfg:2 t=2 a=4

ACK sips:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [field1] <sips:[field1]@[field3>;[$2] To: [field0] <sips:[field0]@[field2]>;[$1] Call-ID:[$3] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: <sips:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [field1] <sip:[field1]@[field3]>;[$2] To: [field0] <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;[$1] Record-Route:[$5] Call-ID:[$3] CSeq: 4 BYE Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: [len]
